primary_colors: warm earth tones, terracotta, caramel brown, warm beige, sand
design_context.lighting_mood: clean minimalist aesthetic, sharp geometric lines, polished surfaces, recessed lighting, uncluttered spaces
design_context.overall_description: Warm Earth color palette. Sleek & Clean atmosphere.

3879822c-fd45-4372-8e24-14fad800e921.generated_prompt: A high-detail 3D interior visualization render from a cinematic, low-angle perspective, showcasing a sophisticated modern master bedroom bathed in soft, diffused natural light entering from a large, flush-mounted window on the far wall, creating subtle, elongated shadows across the polished concrete floor. The walls are finished in a smooth, warm beige plaster, contrasting subtly with a feature wall behind the bed, clad in large format, matte terracotta-toned ceramic tiles. A luxurious king-sized bed with a low-profile frame upholstered in a caramel brown linen fabric is centrally placed against this feature wall, flanked by two minimalist nightstands crafted from blackened steel with honed, sand-colored quartz tops. On the left nightstand rests a sleek, cylindrical table lamp with a brushed brass finish emitting a soft, warm glow. To the right of the bed, a sculptural, modern armchair upholstered in a textured, muted sand bouclé fabric provides a comfortable reading nook, positioned next to a tall, open-frame bookshelf made of dark stained oak and polished brass accents, displaying a curated selection of art books and minimalist ceramic vases. The ceiling features recessed linear LED lighting and a simple, unadorned plaster finish, maintaining the clean, geometric lines of the space. Global illumination is meticulously rendered, producing realistic soft shadows and volumetric lighting that emphasizes the architectural clarity and uncluttered aesthetic. The atmosphere is one of serene luxury and understated elegance, with precise material textures and clean geometry, characteristic of a high-end architectural 3D rendering.

00e88019-0528-46e8-aaf9-653784b905ae.generated_prompt: A professional 3D interior visualization render captures a luxurious modern master bathroom, showcasing a pristine, warm earth tone aesthetic from a cinematic, slightly elevated eye-level perspective looking towards the far wall, creating significant depth of field. The walls are clad in largeformat, honed sand-colored limestone tiles, perfectly aligned with minimal grout lines, transitioning seamlessly into a lower dado rail of textured caramel brown Venetian plaster. The ceiling is a perfectly smooth, warm beige painted surface, subtly illuminated by recessed linear LED strip lighting that casts a soft, even glow. The floor is composed of large, polished concrete slabs in a light terracotta hue, reflecting the ambient light with a subtle sheen. In the foreground, to the left, a frameless, clear tempered glass shower enclosure stands prominently, its polished chrome hardware glinting softly. Inside, a single, modern rainfall showerhead made of brushed stainless steel gleams. A minimalist, dark caramel-brown powder-coated steel towel rack is artfully mounted on the right-hand wall, holding pristine white organic cotton towels. The clean geometry of the space is paramount, with sharp, precise edges defining every surface. Global illumination ensures realistic light bounces, while subtle ambient occlusion deepens shadows in corners and around fixtures, enhancing depth. The overall atmosphere is sleek and clean, with a profound sense of polished tranquility, exhibiting impeccable 3D rendered quality with flawless geometry, perfectly applied PBR textures, and volumetric lighting that highlights the uncluttered space.
